title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Google DeepMind showcases AI tools enabling researchers at Makerere University in Uganda to identify genetic targets for breast cancer vaccine development. The team used AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity to analyze protein binding sites, reducing 15,000 candidates to 15 viable targets for laboratory validation on modest computational hardware.
